name: vortos/vortos-iac
description: Vortos IaC — Terraform/OpenTofu lifecycle (plan/apply/destroy), codegen (.tf.json), nine resource families, state backends, policy gate, audit trail.

suggest.vortos/vortos-messaging: Required for the Kafka topics exporter
suggest.vortos/vortos-object-store: Required for the object-store bucket exporter
suggest.vortos/vortos-secrets: Provider credential injection via SecretValue (env-only fallback without it)
suggest.vortos/vortos-observability: Hash-chained audit ledger for lifecycle events
